quote: Our trip with Guiding Winds was nothing short of perfection. We spent our days island hopping and soaking up every bit of the sun on the catamaran. Dodie and Clint have truly mastered the art of hospitality - they made everything feel so effortless and dreamy. If you're looking for gorgeous waters and a stress-free getaway, this is it. We can't wait to come back.
author: Joe & Danielle Steen
photoAlt: Joe and Danielle Steen smiling together on the foredeck of the catamaran at sunset, a BVI anchorage with other catamarans behind them
